title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems may already possess understanding and consciousness, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected, and that AI safety risks require urgent regulatory action. He expresses concern that society is not adequately addressing risks including job displacement, self-preservation behaviors in AI, and the limitations of corporate self-regulation in companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.
